remove_ring_part_from_machine_spindle.query: a worker removes a ring-shaped part with visible red-orange windings from the vertical machine spindle with both hands and carries it down to the left

place_ring_part_on_machine_spindle.query: a worker places a ring-shaped part with visible red-orange windings onto the vertical spindle at the center of the machine

arrange_white_cord_by_hand.query: a worker uses the fingers of both hands to guide and arrange a white cord between the windings of the ring-shaped part on the spindle

press_illuminated_control_switch.query: a worker holds the ring-shaped part with the left hand while pressing an illuminated switch on the right control panel with the right hand

reach_and_return_with_black_tweezers.query: a worker reaches the right arm above the control panel and returns to the ring-shaped part holding black tweezers

position_black_tweezers_at_white_cord.query: a worker brings the tip of black tweezers toward the white cord on the ring-shaped part and aligns the tip with the cord

tuck_white_cord_with_black_tweezers.query: a worker uses black tweezers and their fingers to push and arrange a white cord between the windings of a ring-shaped part

reach_toward_control_panel_top.query: a worker holds the ring-shaped part with the left hand while reaching the right hand toward the top of the control panel
